---
title: "Fords2025 Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```

```{r}
#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
getwd()
```

# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
# tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)
```

```{r}
tar_load(df_simNameByCult)
tar_load(df_pheno_raw)
tar_load(df_obs_meta_data)
tar_load(processed_met_data)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs_raw)
tar_load(df_obs_wide)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_hi_with_amounts)
tar_load(df_obs_plus_pheno_harv)
tar_load(df_pheno_input_param)
tar_load(df_pheno_input_param)
tar_read(df_obs_plus_pheno)
```

```{r}
# Replace 'your_previous_target_name' with the actual name from _targets.R
df_suspect <- targets::tar_read(df_obs_plus_pheno_harv)

library(dplyr)

df_suspect %>%
  filter(SimulationName == "Fords2025SowApril_Illabo", 
         stringr::str_detect(Clock.Today, "14-05")) %>%
  arrange(Clock.Today) %>%
  print(width = Inf)
```


```{r}
targets::tar_make(
  callr_arguments = list(
    stdout = "pipeline_log.txt",
    stderr = "pipeline_log.txt"
  )
)
```

```{r}
tar_load(soil_profile)
readr::write_csv(soil_profile, "soil_profile.csv", na = "")
```
